Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class PartyLegalNaturalPersonTaxProfile

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.PartyLegalNaturalPersonTaxProfile
public class PartyLegalNaturalPersonTaxProfile extends Object
PartyLegalNaturalPersonTaxProfile - Tax-related attributes at the for the account; A tax profile with taxpayer attributes is located on the legal_natural_person or legal_entity objects elsewhere on the account record.
